rules.description: Map Hyper + Space to Option + Space
Home row mods - opt, ctrl, cmd, shift
Simultaneous keys (jk -> Escape, kl -> Enter) - English Layout Only
Any Option key to F18 if pressed alone
Use option+1/2 to switch language strictly.
Hyper Key: Right Option + left option + left command (⌃⌥⌘)
Post space is pressed alone, left_ctrl otherwise
Mac OSX: disable cmd + h to prevent minimising an application window
Mac OSX: left cmd + double-tap q → close application

manipulators.description: Change caps_lock to command+control+option. or escape
